Name: Zoning, 164th Street Rezoning, Queens (N 250291 ZRQ).
Title: Application number N 250291 ZRQ (164th Street Rezoning) submitted by 88-66 Myrtle LLC, pursuant to Section 201 of the New York City Charter, for an amendment of the Zoning Resolution of the City of New York, amending APPENDIX F for the purpose of establishing a Mandatory Inclusionary Housing Area, Borough of Queens, Community District 8, Council District 24.

History.Description: This Land Use Application was Introduced by Council
